---
title: "Core Concepts in Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation"
description: "Synthesis note on recurring concepts in Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation."
book_id: "handbook-practical-program-evaluation"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Synthesis"
citation_key: "newcomer_hatry_wholey_2015_handbook_practical_program_evaluation"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-1:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch01-chapter-1-planning-and-designing-useful-evaluations:c0003"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch05-chapter-5-performance-measurement:c0001"
source_status: "needs_review"
---
## Source

This synthesis draws across the generated notes for *Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation* [@newcomer_hatry_wholey_2015_handbook_practical_program_evaluation].

## Central Logic

Practical evaluation should be credible enough for decisions and useful enough to improve public and nonprofit programs.

## Concepts

- Evaluation planning: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.
- Stakeholder engagement: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.
- Logic modeling: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.
- Evaluability assessment: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.
- Performance measurement: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.
- Evaluation use: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.

## Links

- [Evaluation Planning and Design](section-01-planning-and-design.qmd)
- [Planning and Designing Useful Evaluations](section-02-planning-useful-evaluations.qmd)
- [Performance Measurement and Program Evaluation](section-03-performance-measurement.qmd)

## References
